---
title: Midterm
author: Midterm
date: '2026-03-12'
pub-date: '2025-03-05'
categories:
- Exam
- Week07
- Week09
type: exam
---

Accept this assignment through the link in Canvas.

The exam is a comprehensive take-home exam. 



```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height = "500px" src="https://unl-statistics.github.io/stat251/exam/midterm-data-sandhills/index.html"></iframe>
```
